headline: FTSE 100 Live: London stocks slip less than Europe and US peers, as tobacco and oil gain
summary: FTSE 100 down 28 points at 10,241 UK gilts near recent highs amidst possible Starmer exit Intertek received higher offer from private equity suitor Vodafone, Imperial Brands, Wickes report results 4.18pm: FTSE outperforming despite political turmoil The Footsie has trimmed losses...
